entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop studied for yield response to water availability

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which fluctuates based on drought stress and water availability

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The lack of water availability that causes fluctuations in grain yield

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Tropical environments characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the 24 semi-arid tropical environments were located

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The pattern and amount of water available to the plant throughout the season

entities.name: SOIL WATER BUDGET
entities.description: A simple calculation method used to determine the water satisfaction index

entities.name: WATER SATISFACTION INDEX
entities.description: An integrated measure of plant-available water (WSI) used to estimate environmental potential for yield

entities.name: SEASONAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The total rainfall during the growing season, found to be poorly related to grain yield

entities.name: WATER LOSSES
entities.description: Losses of water from the soil-plant system accounted for by the WSI

entities.name: PAN EVAPORATION
entities.description: The rate of evaporation from a pan, accounted for by the WSI

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER
entities.description: The number of grains produced, influenced by water availability patterns

entities.name: GRAIN MASS
entities.description: The weight of the grains produced, influenced by both water availability and temperature

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental temperature that affects grain mass
